zh.Herstmonceux, Hailsham, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可賀斯特蒙瑟
zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Monceux於1306年出生在英國素可賀斯特蒙瑟時，她的父親John de Monceaux II27歲，母親Olympia23歲。她於大約1325年與Sir John Fiennes II在英國素可賀斯特蒙瑟結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1335年在她的家鄉享年29歲。

zh-hans.Herstmonceux, Hailsham, Sussex, England: 英国英格兰素可賀斯特蒙瑟
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Monceux于1306年出生在英国素可賀斯特蒙瑟时，她的父亲John de Monceaux II27岁，母亲Olympia23岁。她于大约1325年与Sir John Fiennes II在英国素可賀斯特蒙瑟结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1335年在她的家乡享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Monceux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Colette, Francois, Noemie.

French: habitational name from (Les) Monceaux, the name of several places in the northern part of France, derived from Late Latin monticellum ‘little mountain’, a diminutive of mons ‘mountain’, genitive montis.

variants.name: Moncion
meanings: Hispanic (Dominican Republic; Monción): of French origin, most likely a derivative of Late Latin monticellum ‘little mountain’ (see Monceaux ). The surname Moncion, which is virtually non-existing in France, is also found in Haiti.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Monceux was born in 1306, in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England, her father, John de Monceaux II, was 27 and her mother, Olympia, was 23. She married Sir John Fiennes II about 1325, in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1335, in her hometown, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Monceux est née en 1306, à Herstmonceux, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John de Monceaux II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Olympia, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Fiennes II environ 1325, à Herstmonceux, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1335, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Monceux 1306 in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Monceaux II 27 und ihre Mutter Olympia 23. Sie hat um 1325 in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England Sir John Fiennes II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1335 im Alter von 29 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Monceux è nata il nel 1306 nel Herstmonceux, Sussex, England, sua padre, John de Monceaux II, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Olympia, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Fiennes II circa 1325, nel Herstmonceux, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1335, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.Herstmonceux, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスハーストモンセウックス
ja.Herstmonceux, Hailsham, Sussex, England: イギリスイギリススセックスハーストモンセウックス
ja.lifeSummary: Maud Monceuxが1306年にイギリススセックスハーストモンセウックスで生まれた時，父John de Monceaux IIは27歳，母Olympiaは23歳であった。約1325年にイギリススセックスハーストモンセウックスでSir John Fiennes IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1335年に故郷で29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Monceux(이)가 1306년 영국 수세스 허스트몬스우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Monceaux II(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Olympia(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1325년 영국 수세스 허스트몬스우스에서 Sir John Fiennes II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1335년 그녀의 고향에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Herstmonceux, Hailsham, Sussex, England: Herstmonceux, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Monceux nasceu em 1306, em Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Monceaux II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Olympia, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Fiennes II aproximadamente 1325, em Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1335, em sua cidade natal, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Monceux родилась в 1306 г. в местности хирстмонсеукс, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Monceaux II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Olympia, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Fiennes II около 1325 г. в местности хирстмонсеукс, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1335 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud Monceux nació en 1306, en Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Monceaux II, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Olympia, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir John Fiennes II aproximadamente 1325, en Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1335, en su pueblo, a la edad de 29 años.
